description: A production supervisor needs to manage a work order for joining two fuselage sections on the assembly line.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the work order for the fuselage section join.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the work order and its associated tasks.

nodes.task_description: Verify that all prerequisite tasks, such as pre-positioning the sections and inspecting the joints, are complete.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms all preceding steps are marked as complete.

nodes.task_description: Update the work order status to 'Complete' after the technicians finish the join and it passes inspection.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the work order status.
